title: Protective Factors for Resilience Among Left-Behind Children: A Systematic Review
author: Indriani, Esther
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset includes the study extraction sheet, screening database, and quality appraisal checklist used for the Systematic Literature Review of Protective Factors for Resilience Among Left-Behind Children. The protocol for this systematic review was registered with PROSPERO (CDR420251041211) on April 30, 2025.
steps_raw: This dataset includes the study extraction sheet, screening database, and quality appraisal checklist used for the Systematic Literature Review of Protective Factors for Resilience Among Left-Behind Children. The protocol for this systematic review was registered with PROSPERO (CDR420251041211) on April 30, 2025.
